author: vvo
subject: v2.2.2
body: ## [2.2.2](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v2.2.1...v2.2.2) (2017-01-18) ### Bug Fixes * **react-router:** search was triggered two many times (algolia/react-instantsearch#1840) ([f0ca77b](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/f0ca77b)) * **SFFV:** empty query triggered a new SFFV (algolia/react-instantsearch#1875) ([8f816f0](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/8f816f0))
